caption: A man wearing a grey t-shirt, a grey baseball cap with a circular logo, and black over-ear headphones is speaking into a professional microphone. The microphone is held by a black boom arm with the text "BlueMicrophone Studio USB" printed on the side. He is positioned in front of a dark grey wall consisting of sound-dampening acoustic panels. The man has a tattoo on his upper right arm and is gesturing with his right hand as he speaks. Across the sequence, his facial expression shifts from a neutral, focused look to a wide smile and open-mouthed laugh, while his head tilts slightly back. His posture remains consistent as he leans toward the microphone, maintaining a close distance throughout the brief interaction.
